architectureDecision.label: Unified applied_sequence (shared stream)
architectureDecision.rationale: Planning and task events share workflow-cannon/task-state sequence; kit_task_state_projection_meta applied_sequence covers full replay without new DDL.

readyReview.decision: No separate planning sequence column; hydrate replays planning.* in the same loop as task.*.

technicalBreakdown: Extend replayTailFromSnapshot / event apply loop for planning kinds in unified sequence order.
Keep kit_task_state_projection_meta applied_sequence as single cursor (no KIT_SQLITE_USER_VERSION bump for planning-only meta).
Extend task-state-status-runtime with optional planning summary fields (catalog/workspace status freshness).
Add hydrate golden test with catalog + workspace status events interleaved with task events.

acceptanceCriteria: task-state-hydrate with fetch:true applies planning events to kit_phase_catalog and kit_workspace_status in stream sequence order.
task-state-status JSON reports sync state using unified applied_sequence (current, behind, conflict) with optional planning summary.
Post-merge/post-rewrite hooks and extension git HEAD listener converge planning state without manual steps.
Mixed task+planning fixture hydrate test passes; no separate planning_sequence column required.
